title: BIOPRODUSE INOVATIVE PENTRU PROTECȚIA FRUCTELOR LA DEPOZITARE
description: A project to establish an operational group in the fruit sector and develop innovative biobased edible coatings for the postharvest protection of fruits. The coatings, formulated from natural polysaccharide and protein matrices enriched with plant extracts, were tested on fruit cultivars from Voinesti and Dâmbovița to evaluate their antimicrobial, antioxidant, moisture and gas barrier, and aroma retention properties.
